title: Define update check contracts
description: Create src/update-checker.ts: define UpdateCheckResult and UpdateCheckCache interfaces
acceptance_criteria: WHEN TypeScript builds THEN update checker exports UpdateCheckResult and UpdateCheckCache interfaces with currentVersion latestVersion updateAvailable checkedAt and cache fields; APIs remain additive.
review_initial_requirements: Check public names and field optionality are stable and do not couple to CLI internals.

title: Implement update cache read/write
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement readCache() and writeCache() for ~/.autob/update-check.json with 24h TTL
acceptance_criteria: WHEN readCache()/writeCache() run THEN they read/write ~/.autob/update-check.json, tolerate missing or malformed cache by returning undefined, and treat entries older than 24h as expired.
review_initial_requirements: Check cache path is under ~/.autob, JSON parse errors are silent, and 24h TTL boundary is tested.

title: Fetch latest npm package version
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement fetchLatestVersion() using fetch with 3s AbortSignal timeout against registry.npmjs.org
acceptance_criteria: WHEN fetchLatestVersion() runs THEN it fetches https://registry.npmjs.org/autobiology-cli/latest using AbortSignal timeout 3000ms, parses version from trusted field shape, and returns undefined on invalid response or errors.
review_initial_requirements: Check network response parsing treats payload as untrusted, timeout is configurable for tests, and errors are silent.

title: Compare major.minor.patch versions
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement semver comparison logic (major.minor.patch string compare)
acceptance_criteria: WHEN compareVersions()/isNewerVersion() run THEN they compare numeric major.minor.patch segments correctly for newer, equal, older, and malformed versions.
review_initial_requirements: Check comparison is numeric not lexicographic and malformed versions do not trigger update notices.

title: Combine update check cache, fetch, compare
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement checkForUpdate() combining cache read + fetch + semver compare + cache write with silent error handling
acceptance_criteria: WHEN checkForUpdate() runs THEN fresh cache skips fetch, expired/missing cache fetches registry, writes cache, returns update result only when latest is newer, and all IO/network errors return undefined silently.
review_initial_requirements: Check cache/fetch/compare composition, no stdout/stderr side effects, and no thrown errors on expected failures.

title: Render update notice
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement printUpdateNotice() to render boxed upgrade prompt to stderr after pipeline completes
acceptance_criteria: WHEN printUpdateNotice() receives an available update THEN it writes a boxed upgrade prompt to stderr; WHEN no update is available or result is undefined THEN it writes nothing.
review_initial_requirements: Check notice text includes current/latest versions and npm install command, and non-update path is silent.

title: Execute self update command
description: Update src/update-checker.ts: implement runSelfUpdate() executing npm install -g autobiology-cli@latest via child_process.execFile
acceptance_criteria: WHEN runSelfUpdate() runs THEN it executes npm install -g autobiology-cli@latest via child_process.execFile, streams/surfaces success output, and returns a structured success/failure result without exposing secrets.
review_initial_requirements: Check execFile arguments are not shell-interpolated and failures return structured errors.

title: Run update check around CLI entrypoint
description: Update src/cli.ts: inject checkForUpdate() at startup and printUpdateNotice() after parseAsync in the entrypoint block
acceptance_criteria: WHEN autob is executed as the entrypoint THEN checkForUpdate() starts at startup and printUpdateNotice() runs after parseAsync completes, without blocking command registration tests or changing imported createProgram() behavior.
review_initial_requirements: Check entrypoint uses parseAsync and does not make tests hit network by default through createProgram().
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/cli.test.ts tests/update-checker.test.ts and npm test.

title: Add autob update command
description: Update src/cli.ts: add autob update subcommand with --check flag wiring to checkForUpdate and runSelfUpdate
acceptance_criteria: WHEN autob update runs THEN it attempts runSelfUpdate(); WHEN autob update --check runs THEN it only checks latest version and prints a status/notice without installing; docs mention the command.
review_initial_requirements: Check --check does not call runSelfUpdate, command has useful output, and CLI reference is updated.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/cli.test.ts tests/update-checker.test.ts and npm test.

title: Test fetchLatestVersion versions
description: Create tests/update-checker.test.ts: test fetchLatestVersion with mocked fetch (newer/equal/older version)
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests/update-checker.test.ts runs THEN mocked fetch covers newer, equal, and older registry versions without real network.
review_initial_requirements: Check tests mock global fetch and assert current/latest/updateAvailable outcomes without external calls.

title: Test update cache TTL behavior
description: Update tests/update-checker.test.ts: test cache hit within 24h skips fetch and cache expiry triggers fetch
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests/update-checker.test.ts runs THEN cache hit within 24h skips fetch and cache expiry triggers fetch.
review_initial_requirements: Check tests use isolated temp home/cache path and do not touch real ~/.autob.

title: Test silent network failures
description: Update tests/update-checker.test.ts: test network failure and timeout return undefined silently
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests/update-checker.test.ts runs THEN network failure and timeout/abort paths return undefined silently.
review_initial_requirements: Check failure tests assert no throw and no output side effects.

title: Test update notice rendering
description: Update tests/update-checker.test.ts: test printUpdateNotice renders box when update available and nothing when not
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests/update-checker.test.ts runs THEN notice box renders only when updateAvailable is true and is silent otherwise.
review_initial_requirements: Check output goes to stderr-compatible stream and includes exact upgrade command.

title: Test CLI update command registration
description: Update tests/cli.test.ts: verify update and update --check subcommands are registered
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests/cli.test.ts runs THEN update and update --check are registered and wired without real npm install or network.
review_initial_requirements: Check createProgram dependency injection can provide fake update checker/self updater and command output is testable.
